creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 205320
Patch (0.8.4 -> 0.8.6)

plata-theme has been updated to 0.8.6.

Upstream changes:
- Revived Mate desktop support for 1.22 (and Marco >= 1.22.2).
- Updated GtkPopover styling again (Gtk 4.0).
- Added GtkMessageDialog header label styling (Gtk 4.0).
- Added GtkHeaderBar default-decoration's menubutton node styling for fallback-appmenu buttons (Gtk 4.0).

https://gitlab.com/tista500/plata-theme/-/tags/0.8.6

Port changes:
- Temporarily disable Mate option since it requires marco >=1.22.2, which is not yet available in the Ports tree.

QA:
poudriere testport OK (releng/12.0 amd64)
